diff --git a/electron/main.js b/electron/main.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..772d2cd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/electron/main.js
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+const { app, BrowserWindow } = require('electron');
+const path = require('path');
+
+let mainWindow;
+
+function createWindow() {
+  console.log('Creating browser window...');
+  mainWindow = new BrowserWindow({
+    width: 1200,
+    height: 800,
+    webPreferences: {
+      nodeIntegration: false,
+      contextIsolation: true,
+      preload: path.join(__dirname, 'preload.js'),
+    },
+  });
+
+  // Load the Next.js dev server URL
+  const url = process.env.NEXT_URL || 'http://localhost:3000';
+  console.log(`Loading URL: ${url}`);
+  mainWindow.loadURL(url);
+
+  mainWindow.webContents.on('did-finish-load', () => {
+    console.log('Window loaded successfully.');
+  });
+
+  mainWindow.webContents.on('did-fail-load', (event, errorCode, errorDescription) => {
+    console.error('Failed to load window:', errorCode, errorDescription);
+  });
+
+  mainWindow.on('closed', function () {
+    console.log('Browser window closed.');
+    mainWindow = null;
+  });
+}
+
+app.on('ready', () => {
+  console.log('Electron app is ready.');
+  createWindow();
+});
+
+app.on('window-all-closed', function () {
+  if (process.platform !== 'darwin') {
+    app.quit();
+  }
+});
+
+app.on('activate', function () {
+  if (mainWindow === null) {
+    createWindow();
+  }
+});

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
fix: resolve terminal-server startup and add Electron debug logs

Fixes a crash in `terminal-server/server.js` when running locally where `__dirname` was undefined in ES Module scope. Adds helpful lifecycle console logs to the `electron/main.js` script to make debugging easier if the application crashes or fails to load.

diff --git a/electron/main.js b/electron/main.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..772d2cd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/electron/main.js
@@ -0,0 +1,52 @@
+const { app, BrowserWindow } = require('electron');
+const path = require('path');
+
+let mainWindow;
+
+function createWindow() {
+  console.log('Creating browser window...');
+  mainWindow = new BrowserWindow({
+    width: 1200,
+    height: 800,
+    webPreferences: {
+      nodeIntegration: false,
+      contextIsolation: true,
+      preload: path.join(__dirname, 'preload.js'),
+    },
+  });
+
+  // Load the Next.js dev server URL
+  const url = process.env.NEXT_URL || 'http://localhost:3000';
+  console.log(`Loading URL: ${url}`);
+  mainWindow.loadURL(url);
+
+  mainWindow.webContents.on('did-finish-load', () => {
+    console.log('Window loaded successfully.');
+  });
+
+  mainWindow.webContents.on('did-fail-load', (event, errorCode, errorDescription) => {
+    console.error('Failed to load window:', errorCode, errorDescription);
+  });
+
+  mainWindow.on('closed', function () {
+    console.log('Browser window closed.');
+    mainWindow = null;
+  });
+}
+
+app.on('ready', () => {
+  console.log('Electron app is ready.');
+  createWindow();
+});
+
+app.on('window-all-closed', function () {
+  if (process.platform !== 'darwin') {
+    app.quit();
+  }
+});
+
+app.on('activate', function () {
+  if (mainWindow === null) {
+    createWindow();
+  }
+});

gitPatch.suggestedCommitMessage:
fix: resolve terminal-server startup and add Electron debug logs

Fixes a crash in `terminal-server/server.js` when running locally where `__dirname` was undefined in ES Module scope. Adds helpful lifecycle console logs to the `electron/main.js` script to make debugging easier if the application crashes or fails to load.

pullRequest.title: Add basic Electron shell wrapper
pullRequest.description:
- Creates `electron/main.js` to serve as the Electron entry point, opening a window to `http://localhost:3000`.
- Updates `package.json` by adding the required `"main": "electron/main.js"` property.
- Adds `"electron:dev"` script that uses `concurrently` and `wait-on` to run the frontend, terminal backend, and Electron wrapper together.
- Installs `electron`, `concurrently`, and `wait-on` as devDependencies.
